name: accessibility
description: Adds accessibility auditing to the team's workflow. Surfaces WCAG violations and keeps the product usable by everyone.

tasks.title: Conduct initial accessibility audit
tasks.description: Audit the project for WCAG 2.2 compliance: check semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, color contrast, ARIA usage, and screen reader compatibility. Document findings and remediation plan in docs/ACCESSIBILITY-AUDIT.md.
